evals.prompt: After completing a feature to add JWT authentication, extract knowledge decisions: JWT chosen over Session due to mobile compatibility, error: command injection in add-dependency.sh fixed with input validation
evals.expected_output: Knowledge record with type=F, status=success, 1 decision, 1 error, auth-related tags

evals.prompt: Search for relevant knowledge when user asks 'I need user authentication with OAuth2' in project 'portrait'
evals.expected_output: Top-3 relevant past sessions with auth-related decisions and patterns

evals.prompt: Migrate historical knowledge from git commits: 'feat(auth): implement JWT-based authentication', 'fix: command injection in add-dependency.sh'
evals.expected_output: 2 knowledge records extracted from git history with correct types

assertions.name: feat_type
assertions.description: feat commit mapped to Type F

assertions.name: fix_type
assertions.description: fix commit mapped to Type B
